PHP classes for Cppcheck and cpplint integration, Phutil library registration, and firmware linting scripts.

## Folders
- **[linters](linters/README.md)**: PHP classes for integrating Cppcheck and cpplint, Phutil library registration, and firmware linting scripts.

## Files
- **[applib.rule](applib.rule.md)**: Defines a linting rule to encourage the use of `applib_malloc` for exported structures.
- **[tintin.cfg](tintin.cfg.md)**: Defines memory and resource allocation and deallocation functions for linting in XML format.
- **[tintin.rule](tintin.rule.md)**: XML rules for linting style issues in Pebble firmware, including macros and memory allocation functions.
